title: iberis campestris
intro: Iberis campestris, also known as the rockcress plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iberis campestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Iberis campestris can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
